_comment: Reference seed-users for the no-sponsor local-stack (read by portal_server_evs via PORTAL_SEED_USERS_PATH; parsed by seed_config.dart). Applied idempotently on boot. One user per role so a core dev can exercise every role's portal UI from hht_diary alone. Under PORTAL_AUTH_MODE=dev the userId (an email) is typed verbatim with no password. Under PORTAL_AUTH_MODE=session the local-stack sets PORTAL_DEV_SEED_PASSWORD=example, so seedTestAccountActivations provisions each email in the Firebase emulator with the shared password 'example' and marks it active -- log in with e.g. admin@reference.local / example (no activation link; no email PIN while PORTAL_SEED_REQUIRE_2FA=false). Scopes mirror the canonical bootstrap-admin assignment (site wildcard + tier:staff for staff-tier roles; tier+site wildcard for SystemOperator).

users._comment: Multi-role user: holds Administrator + CRA so login shows the post-login role-selection step (DIARY-GUI-role-switching). Single-role users skip it.
